name: Servo Motor SG90 9g
description: Micro servo motor 9g, 180° rotation, 1.8kg/cm torque. The most popular servo for robotics, Arduino projects and RC models. Comes with 3 interchangeable horns and mounting screws.

name: Jumper Wires Male-Male (40-pack)
description: 40-piece male-to-male jumper wires for breadboards. 20cm long, 2.54mm pitch. Essential for Arduino prototyping — easily connect components without soldering.

name: 2-Pin T-Type Connector — Female
description: 2-pin T-type electrical connector, female terminal. Used in electronics, robotics and automation projects. Push-lock connection for quick and secure wiring.

name: 2-Pin T-Type Connector — Male
description: 2-pin T-type electrical connector, male terminal. Mates with the corresponding female connector. Used in electronics, robotics and automation projects.

name: Altoids-Style Metal Storage Tin
description: Hinged metal tin approx. 9.5×5.5×2cm. Perfect for storing small electronics components, mini Arduino projects, or as an enclosure for DIY builds. Classic Altoids style.

name: IP5328P Power Bank Charger Module
description: Power bank charge/discharge module with USB-C + USB-A input, 5V/3A output. Supports 18650 Li-ion cells. Built-in LED charge indicator. Perfect for DIY portable power banks.

name: Laser Engraving Module — Bibo 3D Printer
description: Laser engraving module compatible with Bibo 3D printers. Estimated 500mW–1W power. Engrave wood, leather, acrylic and dark materials. Adds laser functionality to your 3D printer.

name: Electrolytic Capacitor 1000µF 16V
description: Aluminum electrolytic capacitor 1000µF 16V. Through-hole, polarized. Used in power supply filters, DC sources and decoupling circuits. Pack of multiple units.

name: Class D Audio Amplifier 2×60W (120W)
description: Stereo Class D digital amplifier, 2 channels. 12V–24V DC supply, 2×60W (120W total). Independent L/R volume pots, green speaker terminals. Efficient, low heat. Great for DIY audio systems.

name: TPA3110 XH-A232 Audio Amplifier 30W+30W
description: Stereo Class D TPA3110 amplifier module. 2×30W (60W total), 8V–26V DC. Integrated heatsink, compact design. L+/L- and R+/R- speaker outputs. Ideal for desktop speaker builds.

name: BMS 4S 14.8V Li-ion Protection Board
description: 4-cell (4S) BMS for 18650 Li-ion battery packs. 14.8V nominal (4×3.7V). Overcharge, over-discharge, and short-circuit protection with cell balancing. 10A–20A rated. Code: HX-JH-001.

name: 16mm Illuminated Metal Push Button — Green LED
description: 16mm stainless steel momentary push button with green LED illumination. Threaded mount for panels. LED voltage 3V–12V. Great for custom enclosures, Arduino control panels and DIY projects.

name: B1212S Isolated DC-DC Converter 12V→12V 4W
description: Galvanically isolated DC-DC converter. 12V input → 12V isolated output, 4W. DIP 4-pin encapsulation. RoHS certified. Eliminates ground loops and noise — ideal for industrial and medical applications.

name: Round Rocker Switch ON/OFF — Black (20mm)
description: Black round rocker switch, no LED. ON/OFF SPDT 3-terminal. 20mm panel cutout. Rated 10A 250VAC / 15A 125VAC. Perfect for enclosures, DIY power supplies and control panels.

name: Round Rocker Switch ON/OFF — Green (20mm)
description: Round rocker switch with solid green top, no LED. ON/OFF SPDT. 20mm panel cutout. Rated 10A 250VAC. Great for DIY panels and custom enclosures.

name: Round Rocker Switch ON/OFF — Black + Green LED (20mm)
description: Round black rocker switch with green LED illumination. Lights up when ON. SPDT 3-terminal, 20mm panel cutout. Rated 10A 250VAC. Visual feedback for powered enclosures.

name: Round Rocker Switch ON/OFF — Black + Blue LED (20mm)
description: Round black rocker switch with blue LED illumination. Lights up when ON. SPDT 3-terminal, 20mm panel cutout. Rated 10A 250VAC. Modern look for DIY builds.

name: Mini Rocker Switch ON/OFF — Black KCD11
description: Mini rectangular KCD11 rocker switch. SPST 2-terminal ON/OFF. ~21×15mm panel cutout. Rated 3A 250VAC / 6A 125VAC. Compact size for small enclosures and PCB panels.

name: KEBIDU MP3 Bluetooth Module Kit with Remote
description: MP3/BT audio decoder kit with USB, TF card and Bluetooth support. Front panel with MODE/SCAN/VOL buttons. Includes IR remote control. Stereo audio output. Easy to integrate into DIY speaker boxes.

name: GT2 Timing Belt 6mm — ~5 Meters
description: GT2 timing belt 6mm wide, ~5 meters per roll. 2mm pitch, rubber with fiber reinforcement. Universal standard for 3D printers (Ender, Prusa), CNC machines and robotics.

name: USB Charger for NiMH/NiCd Battery 4.8V
description: USB charger for NiMH/NiCd battery packs. Input: 5V, Output: 4.8V 250mA. Small RC connector output. Compatible with 4.8V RC toy and model battery packs.

name: USB Charger for Li-Po 1S Battery 3.7V
description: USB charger for 1-cell (1S) Li-ion/Li-Po batteries. Input: 5V 1A, Output: 3.7V 1000mA. JST white output connector. Ideal for mini drones, RC toys and single-cell Li-Po projects.

name: 4-Channel Li-Po 1S 3.7V Charger
description: Charges 4 Li-Po 1S batteries simultaneously. 4 LED charge indicators. Compatible with mini drones and quadcopters (Blade Nano, Hubsan, Eachine). DC barrel jack input.

name: Blue Aluminum Heatsink ~25×25mm
description: Anodized blue aluminum heatsink ~25×25mm. Thermal tape pre-applied. Compatible with MOSFETs, chips, Raspberry Pi and ESP32 modules. Improves thermal performance in compact builds.

name: Silver Rectangular Heatsink ~40×25mm
description: Silver aluminum rectangular heatsink ~40×25mm. Thermal tape pre-applied. Ideal for voltage regulators, RAM chips, amplifiers and larger components.

name: Silver Square Heatsink ~14×14mm
description: Silver aluminum square heatsink ~14×14mm. Thermal tape pre-applied. For small SMD chips, Raspberry Pi Zero, ESP8266 and similar compact components.

name: ST-LINK V2 Programmer/Debugger — STM8 & STM32
description: USB ST-LINK V2 programmer and debugger for STM8 and STM32 microcontrollers. Pins: RST, SWIM, SWCLK, SWDIO, GND, 3.3V, 5V. Includes jumper cables. Compatible with STM32CubeIDE, Keil and IAR.

name: 608ZZ Ball Bearing 8×22×7mm
description: Standard 608ZZ double-shielded ball bearing. 8mm bore × 22mm OD × 7mm wide. Universal fit for 3D printers, CNC, skateboards, spinners and robotics. Same bearing used in Ender and Prusa printers.

name: Black Vinyl Electrical Tape 19mm×18.3m
description: Commercial Electric EE-100 black vinyl electrical tape. 19mm × 18.3m (3/4" × 60ft). Rated up to 600V, -10°C to 80°C. UL Listed and CSA certified. Professional quality.

name: Conductive Copper Tape Double-Sided 1/4" × 260ft
description: Double-sided conductive copper tape. 6.35mm wide × 79m long. Conductive on both sides. EMI shielding, stained glass, guitar shielding, electrical repairs and maker projects.

name: 24 AWG Speaker Wire 7.5m
description: 24 AWG parallel zip cord speaker wire, 7.5m (25ft) per pack. 2-conductor with transparent insulation. Connect speakers to any DIY amplifier build.

name: XT60 Female to 4mm Banana Plug Adapter
description: Adapter cable with XT60 female connector on one end and 4mm banana plugs (red/black) on the other. High-current silicone wire. For charging Li-Po batteries with lab chargers (iCharger, ISDT, etc.).

name: XT60 Male Connector Pigtail — Silicone Wire
description: XT60 male connector with short silicone wire pigtail (red/black), tinned ends ready to solder. Install on Li-Po batteries, ESCs or RC/drone builds. High-current rated.

name: Spot Welder Electrode Cable — 4mm Banana + Copper Tip
description: Electrode cable for DIY spot welders. High-current silicone wire, 4mm banana plug on one end, copper tip/needle on the other. Weld nickel strips on 18650 and Li-Po battery packs.

name: Jumper Wires Male-Male 20cm — 10-pack
description: 10-piece M-M jumper wires by EDGELEC. 20cm, 2.54mm pitch, multicolored. RoHS/CE certified. Perfect for Arduino breadboard prototyping. Individual color identification.

name: Jumper Wires Female-Male 20cm — 10-pack
description: 10-piece F-M jumper wires by EDGELEC. 20cm, 2.54mm pitch, multicolored. RoHS/CE certified. Ideal for connecting sensors and modules to Arduino pins.

name: Jumper Wires Female-Female 20cm — 10-pack
description: 10-piece F-F jumper wires by EDGELEC. 20cm, 2.54mm pitch, multicolored. RoHS/CE certified. Ideal for connecting modules with header pins to each other.

name: Piezoelectric Disc with Wires (20mm & 35mm)
description: Bronze piezoelectric discs with soldered red/black wires. Available in 20mm and 35mm sizes. Use as a sound buzzer or vibration/tap sensor in Arduino projects. From the 37-sensor kit.

name: TIANKONGRC TD-S325MG 25Kg Digital Servo
description: High-torque digital servo, 25Kg/cm, 4.8V–6.8V. Metal gears (MG) for durability. Full kit: 2 aluminum 25T horns, bracket and screws. Ideal for robotic arms, heavy RC models and mechanical actuators.

name: HobbyPark HDR315M Digital Metal Gear Servo
description: Digital servo with metal gears (MG). Standard JR/Futaba 3-pin connector. Precision control for RC vehicles, robotics and precision actuator applications.

name: Hitec HS-485HB Analog Servo — Karbonite Gear
description: Premium Hitec HS-485HB servo with Karbonite polymer gears. 4.8Kg/cm @ 4.8V / 6.0Kg/cm @ 6V. Professional grade for RC aircraft, helicopters and robotics. JR/Futaba connector.

name: 28BYJ-48 Stepper Motor + ULN2003 Driver Kit
description: Complete stepper motor kit: 28BYJ-48 5V unipolar motor + ULN2003 driver board. 64-step motor (512 with gearing). LED indicators on driver, 5V–12V compatible. The classic Arduino stepper kit.

name: 24BYJ48 Stepper Motor 5V — 1:64 (no driver)
description: Compact YOFON 24BYJ48 unipolar stepper motor. 5V DC, 1:64 gear ratio. 5-pin JST white connector. Compatible with ULN2003 driver. Sold without driver board.

name: LRS 24BYJ Stepper Motor with Plastic Bracket
description: 5V DC stepper motor with pre-mounted white plastic bracket for easy installation. 5-pin JST connector. Compatible with ULN2003 driver. Ready to mount on your project structure.

name: Aluminum Servo Bracket — Double L Mount
description: Double L-shaped aluminum bracket for standard servo motors. Standard hole pattern for servo body and structural attachment. Lightweight and rigid. Perfect for robotic arm joints.

name: Aluminum Servo Bracket — Wide U Mount
description: Wide U-shaped aluminum servo bracket. Side mounting holes. Used in robot joints, mechanical arms and pan-tilt platforms. Lightweight and strong.

name: Aluminum Servo Bracket — Narrow U Mount
description: Narrow U-shaped aluminum servo bracket. Compact version for tight spaces. Side mounting holes. Ideal for lightweight robotic structures.

name: Redmi Buds 3 Lite TWS Earbuds — Black
description: Redmi Buds 3 Lite (Xiaomi) true wireless earbuds. Bluetooth 5.2, 12mm driver, up to 18h battery with case. IPX4 water resistant. Fast pairing with Xiaomi/Android devices. Sealed in original box.

name: USB-C to Lightning Cable 2m — White
description: 2-meter USB-C to Lightning cable, white. Compatible with iPhone, iPad and iPod Lightning devices. Fast charging compatible. Third-party cable, sealed box.

name: NEMA Stepper Motor Bracket — Small
description: Small black steel L-bracket for NEMA 17 stepper motors. 4 oval adjustment holes. Center shaft clearance. For 3D printers, CNC machines and robotics.

name: NEMA Stepper Motor Bracket — Large
description: Large adjustable-slot steel bracket for NEMA 17 stepper motors. Extended slots for belt tensioning. Ideal for custom 3D printer and CNC builds.

name: Li-ion 2S 18650 Battery 7.4V 1500mAh
description: BLL Li-ion 2-cell (2S) 18650 battery pack, 7.4V 1500mAh. Dual connector: Tamiya + JST. Ready-to-use for RC models, robots and portable electronics projects.

name: NEMA 17 Stepper Motor — Quimat 17HD48002H
description: NEMA 17 bipolar stepper motor, 1.7A, 4-wire. High precision for 3D printers (Ender/Prusa compatible), CNC machines, and robotic arms. Model: 17HD48002H-22B.

name: DC Motor RS-550/775 — Large with Wired Pulley
description: Large DC motor RS-550/775 size with attached wires and pulley on shaft. High RPM, high torque. Suitable for power tools, electric vehicles and heavy-duty robot drives.

name: DC Motor RS-550/775 — Large with GT2 Pulley
description: Large DC motor RS-550/775 with GT2 timing pulley on shaft. Designed for belt-driven systems in robotics and electric vehicles. High RPM, high torque.

name: DC Motor RS-540/545 — Medium with Spade Terminal
description: Medium DC motor RS-540/545 with spade terminals and long shaft. Versatile motor for RC models, DIY projects and moderate-load applications.

name: DC Motor RS-390 12V 16000 RPM — with Pinion Gear
description: Ding Li RS-390 DC motor, 12V, 16000 RPM with pinion gear already mounted on shaft. High-speed motor for RC cars, drones and fast-moving robotics.

name: Qi Wireless Charging Module — USB-C
description: Qi wireless charging transmitter module with inductive coil. USB-C input. 5W standard Qi charging. Add wireless charging to any DIY enclosure or project. Model: 5125-CR.

name: Soft Start Switch Module v2.0
description: Sweep-hands soft start/switch module v2.0. Prevents inrush current damage on power-up for capacitor banks, motor drivers and high-current circuits. Great for protecting amplifiers and LED arrays.

name: LM2596 DC-DC Buck Converter — Adjustable
description: LM2596-based step-down (buck) converter. Adjustable output voltage. Wide input range. Efficient power regulation for Arduino, sensors and any electronics project requiring stable DC.

name: MH-8 IR Obstacle & Line Detection Sensor
description: IR obstacle/line detection sensor module. Adjustable sensitivity via potentiometer. Digital output (D0) compatible with Arduino. Use for line-following robots, proximity detection and object avoidance.

name: MPU-6050 Gyroscope & Accelerometer (GY-521)
description: 6-axis motion sensor: 3-axis gyroscope + 3-axis accelerometer. I2C interface, 3.3V/5V compatible. The GY-521 breakout is standard in drones, balance robots and motion capture projects. Works with Arduino and Raspberry Pi.

name: Laser Module with Vibration Motor DIY Kit
description: DIY laser module kit with vibration motor on blue PCB. Small form factor. Great for beginner laser experiments, light shows and vibration-triggered laser pointer builds.

name: Arduino Nano Compatible Board — SainSmart
description: Arduino Nano V3.0 compatible microcontroller board (SainSmart). ATmega328P, USB Mini-B, 14 digital I/O, 8 analog inputs. 100% compatible with the official Arduino IDE. Perfect compact board for wearables and small projects.

name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Distance Sensor
description: HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor measures distances from 2cm to 400cm with ~3mm accuracy. 5V, 4-pin interface (VCC, Trig, Echo, GND). Essential for obstacle-avoiding robots and distance measurement projects.

name: I2C Temperature Sensor — Piper
description: I2C temperature sensor module from Piper. Plug-and-play digital temperature reading via I2C bus. Compatible with Arduino, Raspberry Pi and BBC micro:bit. Simple 4-wire connection.

name: Color Sensor Module with Optical Lens
description: Color recognition sensor module with optical lens for improved accuracy. Detects RGB color values. Works with Arduino via analog/digital output. For sorting machines, color-matching robots and light experiments.

name: MH-RD Rain Sensor Kit
description: Rain detection kit with sensor board + comparator module. Detects raindrops on the sensor pad. Analog and digital output. For weather stations, automatic windshield wipers and irrigation control.

name: LM2596 Buck Converter with Digital Display
description: Adjustable step-down buck converter with built-in digital voltmeter display. Shows output voltage in real-time. Input: 4V–35V, Output: 1.25V–30V. Perfect for bench power supply builds.

name: Battery Level Indicator Module — 4 LEDs
description: Visual battery level indicator with 4 LEDs showing 25/50/75/100% charge. Compatible with various battery chemistries. Add battery monitoring to any portable project with minimal wiring.

name: BMS 3S 40A 12.6V — 3-Cell Li-ion Protection
description: 3-cell (3S) battery management system, 40A, 12.6V. Overcharge, over-discharge and short-circuit protection for 18650 Li-ion packs. Suitable for e-bikes, power tools and robotics.

name: TP4056 Li-ion Charger Module — Micro-USB
description: TP4056 single-cell Li-ion charger module. Micro-USB input, 1A charging current. Built-in LED indicators (charging/done). The simplest way to add charging to any 18650 or Li-Po battery project.

name: 5mm LEDs — Green (50-pack)
description: 50-pack of 5mm clear-lens green LEDs. Standard through-hole. Use with 220Ω–330Ω resistor at 5V. Perfect for status indicators, light-up Arduino projects and teaching electronics basics.

name: 5mm LEDs — White (80-pack)
description: 80-pack of 5mm clear-lens white LEDs. High brightness. Use with 220Ω–330Ω resistor at 5V. For Arduino indicators, DIY lighting and beginner electronics kits.

name: 5mm LEDs — Blue (50-pack)
description: 50-pack of 5mm clear-lens blue LEDs. Use with 100Ω–220Ω resistor at 5V. Popular for lighting effects, status LEDs and beginner Arduino projects.

name: 5mm LEDs — Yellow (60-pack)
description: 60-pack of 5mm clear-lens yellow LEDs. Use with 220Ω–330Ω resistor at 5V. Great for warning indicators, maker projects and teaching electronics.

name: AD8232 ECG Heart Sensor Kit
description: AD8232 ECG/heart rate sensor kit with electrodes and 3.5mm cable. Reads electrical activity of the heart. Works with Arduino. Includes 3 electrode pads. For biomedical learning, heart monitor projects and bio-sensing experiments.

name: EMG/EKG Bio-Feedback Shield — Arduino
description: Arduino shield for EMG and EKG bio-signal measurement. Captures muscle and heart electrical signals for biofeedback, research and educational biomedical projects.

name: Elegoo Super Starter Kit with Arduino UNO R3
description: Complete beginner electronics kit by Elegoo. Includes Arduino UNO R3 (ATmega328P), 200+ components: breadboard, resistors, LEDs, sensors, motors, LCD, servos and full tutorial PDF. Everything you need to start learning electronics and coding.

name: Elegoo 37-in-1 Sensor Kit V2.0
description: 37-module sensor kit by Elegoo. Includes: IR receiver, temperature sensor, rain sensor, joystick, buzzer, RGB LED, tilt sensor, photo resistor and much more. Perfect complement to an Arduino or Raspberry Pi board.

name: 150W DC-DC Boost Converter Module (CY150)
description: 150W step-up (boost) DC-DC converter with heatsink. Wide input range, adjustable output. For solar charging, battery boost applications and high-power electronics. Model: CY150.

name: Expansion Shield for Arduino Nano — Gold Pins
description: Expansion board for Arduino Nano with gold-plated pins. Breaks out all Nano pins to easy-access screw terminals and headers. Simplifies wiring for standalone projects. Power rails included.

name: Prototype Shield for Arduino UNO
description: Arduino UNO prototype shield with solder area. Stackable design. Allows you to build permanent circuits on top of your UNO. Great for moving from breadboard to soldered prototypes.

name: Arduino Nano Terminal Adapter V1.0
description: Terminal adapter board for Arduino Nano. Converts Nano pins to screw terminal blocks. Easy, solder-free permanent wiring for production builds and classroom projects.

name: Digispark ATtiny85 Board — Micro USB
description: Tiny Arduino-compatible board based on ATtiny85. Micro USB interface, 6 I/O pins, 8KB flash, built-in USB support. The smallest programmable Arduino-like board. Perfect for embedded wearable projects.

name: Terminal Adapter for ESP32 / NodeMCU
description: Screw terminal expansion board for ESP32, NodeMCU V4 and Goouuu boards. Turns all GPIO pins into easy screw terminal connections. No soldering required for quick prototyping.

name: Yahboom YB-MFV03 Expansion Board
description: Yahboom YB-MFV03 multi-function expansion board for robotics. Compatible with various microcontrollers. Includes sensor connectors, servo ports and power management. Version 1.0.

name: ESP-01 (ESP8266) WiFi Module with Adapter
description: ESP-01 ESP8266 WiFi module with USB adapter board. Add WiFi connectivity to any Arduino project. AT command or custom firmware. 802.11 b/g/n, 3.3V, serial UART. The gateway to IoT projects.

name: Game HAT / LCD Game Kit for Raspberry Pi
description: Game HAT display + controls kit for Raspberry Pi. Includes LCD screen, buttons (A/B/X/Y + D-pad), shoulder buttons and power switch. Turn your Raspberry Pi into a handheld game console.

name: LCD Display 16×2 — 1602A Parallel
description: Classic 16-character × 2-line LCD display (1602A). Parallel interface, backlight included. No I2C — direct pin connection. Works with Arduino LiquidCrystal library. Standard for beginner and intermediate projects.

name: Elegoo Arduino UNO R3 — Black Edition
description: Elegoo Arduino UNO R3 compatible board (ATmega328P), sleek black PCB. 14 digital I/O pins, 6 analog inputs, USB-B, barrel jack power. 100% Arduino IDE compatible. Great value for beginners and experts alike.

name: Transparent Propeller — 3-Blade Orange Hub
description: Clear transparent plastic propeller with orange hub, 3 blades. For mini drones, RC aircraft and fan projects. Lightweight and balanced for smooth flight.

name: Mini DC Motor FA-130 — with Orange Cap
description: Compact FA-130 DC motor with orange end cap and smooth shaft. Low voltage, high RPM. The standard motor in beginner robotics kits, fans and simple DC drive projects.

name: micro:bit Breakout Board — m:bit Breakout Mini
description: Breakout expansion board for BBC micro:bit. Exposes all edge connector pins to easy-access headers. Simplifies connecting sensors, servos and modules to your micro:bit. Great for STEM classrooms.

name: Shaft Coupler — Mini DC Motor (Small)
description: Small shaft coupler/collet for mini DC motors (FA-130 type). Attach wheels, gears or propellers to the motor shaft. Friction fit. Essential for building wheeled robots.

name: Shaft Coupler — Mini DC Motor (Large)
description: Larger shaft coupler for mini DC motors. Compatible with broader shafts and heavier attachments. Friction fit for wheels, gears and pulleys.

name: GT2 Idler Pulley with Bearing
description: GT2 smooth idler pulley with pre-installed bearing. Used to tension and redirect GT2 timing belts in 3D printers and CNC machines. Standard 3D printer spare part.

name: DC Barrel Jack Plug — Male
description: Male DC barrel jack plug connector (5.5mm OD / 2.1mm ID standard). Solder type. Connect to DC power cables for custom power supplies, Arduino power leads and electronics enclosures.

name: DC Power Jack — Female PCB Mount
description: Female DC barrel jack for PCB mounting (5.5mm OD / 2.1mm ID). Through-hole. Adds a standard DC power input to any PCB or enclosure project.

name: Resistor 1Ω — Metal Film
description: 1-ohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. Through-hole. Used in current sensing and measurement circuits. Pack of 10.

name: Resistor 10Ω — Metal Film
description: 10-ohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. Through-hole. General purpose use in LED current limiting and filter circuits. Pack of 10.

name: Resistor 100Ω — Metal Film
description: 100-ohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. Through-hole. LED current limiting and general electronics use. Pack of 10.

name: Resistor 220Ω — Metal Film
description: 220-ohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. The most common Arduino LED resistor value. Every electronics kit needs these. Pack of 10.

name: Resistor 330Ω — Metal Film
description: 330-ohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. Through-hole. Ideal for LED circuits with 5V supply. Pack of 10.

name: Resistor 1KΩ — Metal Film
description: 1-kilohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. Through-hole. Pull-up/pull-down resistors, voltage dividers and signal circuits. Pack of 10.

name: Resistor 5KΩ — Metal Film
description: 5-kilohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. Through-hole. Voltage divider networks and pull-up applications. Pack of 10.

name: Resistor 10KΩ — Metal Film
description: 10-kilohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. The standard pull-up resistor value for buttons and I2C buses. A must-have for any electronics workbench. Pack of 10.

name: Resistor 100KΩ — Metal Film
description: 100-kilohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. Through-hole. High-value pull-ups, filters and analog circuits. Pack of 10.

name: Resistor 1MΩ — Metal Film
description: 1-megohm metal film resistor. 1/4W, ±1% tolerance. Through-hole. High-impedance sensing and input circuits. Pack of 10.

name: Power Transistor TO-220
description: General purpose power transistor in TO-220 package. Used for switching and amplification in motor drivers, LED drivers and power circuits. Common in Arduino projects requiring more current than the MCU can supply.

name: MOSFET IRL3713 — N-Channel TO-220
description: IRL3713 N-channel MOSFET in TO-220. Logic-level gate (fully switches at 5V). 30V, 130A. Excellent for Arduino motor control, high-current switching and PWM dimming applications.

name: Transistor TIP32C — PNP Power
description: TIP32C PNP power transistor. 100V, 3A. TO-220 package. Used in complementary pairs with NPN transistors for audio amplifiers and motor H-bridge circuits.

name: Endstop Switch with Cable — 3D Printer
description: Mechanical endstop switch with pre-wired cable. Standard 3D printer limit switch (Ender, Anet compatible). 3-pin JST connector. Replace worn endstops or use in custom CNC and robotics projects.

name: Mini Breadboard 170 Points — Black
description: Mini 170-point solderless breadboard, black. Compact size, perfect for small circuits and module testing. Adhesive backing for mounting. Great for beginner projects and classroom use.

name: Full-Size Breadboard 830 Points — White
description: Standard 830-point solderless breadboard, white. Two bus rails each side, numbered columns. The essential prototyping tool for Arduino and electronics projects. No soldering required.

name: Smart Switch Module Dry Contact — WSM16-DC
description: WiFi smart switch module with dry contact relay output. WSM16-DC. Controllable via app or home automation system. For smart home DIY projects, remote control of lights and appliances.

name: SONOFF MINI Extreme Wi-Fi Smart Switch
description: SONOFF MINI R4 ultra-compact Wi-Fi smart switch. Works with Alexa, Google Home and eWeLink. Install inside any light switch box. Control lights remotely from anywhere. No neutral wire option available.

name: USB-A to Mini-USB Cable
description: USB Type-A to Mini-USB cable. Charge and data transfer. Compatible with older Arduino boards (UNO rev1, Nano), cameras, GPS units and many other devices.

name: Long Micro USB Cable — ~6 Meters
description: Extra-long micro USB cable, approximately 6 meters. Charge and data. Great for Raspberry Pi installations, hard-to-reach spots and permanent project wiring.

name: Pillow Block Bearing KP08
description: KP08 pillow block bearing with housing. 8mm bore. Bolt-mount for easy integration into frames, CNC and robotics. Supports radial loads on rotating shafts.

name: CNC Laser Module
description: CNC-compatible laser module. Mounts on standard CNC or 3D printer frames. For engraving wood, cardboard, leather and dark acrylic. PWM power control via CNC firmware (GRBL compatible).

name: JST/Dupont Connector Kit — Female Housing
description: Female JST/Dupont housing connector assortment. Various pin counts (2, 3, 4-pin). Use with matching male pins. Essential for making custom cables and wiring harnesses in electronics projects.

name: JST/Dupont Connector Kit — Male Housing
description: Male JST/Dupont housing connector assortment. Various pin counts. Use with matching female housings to build custom connectors, sensors and module harnesses.

name: Flexible Shaft Coupler — Aluminum
description: Aluminum flexible shaft coupler. Absorbs motor vibration and misalignment. Common in 3D printers and CNC machines to connect stepper motors to lead screws. Available in various bore sizes.

name: Universal Joint — Small
description: Small universal joint (U-joint). Transfers rotation between non-aligned shafts. For mini robotics, custom drive trains and mechanical linkages requiring angle flexibility.

name: Universal Joint — Large
description: Large universal joint (U-joint). Heavy-duty version for more torque and larger shaft diameters. Custom robotics, RC vehicles and power transmission at angles.

name: Bluetooth Module HC-05/HC-06 — DSD TECH
description: DSD TECH HC-05 or HC-06 Bluetooth serial module. 2.4GHz, UART interface. Wireless serial communication between Arduino and phone/PC. Range ~10m. Classic module for wireless robot control and data logging.

name: Cable Clips with Screw — White
description: White plastic cable clips with screw holes. Organize and route cables neatly in enclosures, along walls and on project frames. Clean cable management for professional builds.

name: Polycrystalline Solar Cells ~6×6cm
description: Polycrystalline silicon solar cells, approximately 6×6cm. For DIY solar panel assembly, energy harvesting experiments and educational solar projects. Multiple cells needed to generate useful voltage.

name: Water Flow Sensor — SAIER SEN-HZ21WA
description: Hall-effect water flow sensor by SAIER (SEN-HZ21WA). 5V, pulse output. Measures water flow rate via pulse counting on Arduino. For smart irrigation, aquarium control and liquid dispensing systems.

name: DC Power Cable with Oval ON/OFF Switch
description: DC power cable with built-in oval ON/OFF rocker switch. Easy power control for battery-powered Arduino and electronics projects without modifying your enclosure.

name: DC Brushless Fan 40×40mm — AMBEYOND
description: AMBEYOND AV-F4010MB 40×40mm DC brushless cooling fan. Quiet, efficient airflow for electronics enclosures, amplifier cooling and Raspberry Pi cases. Long-lasting brushless motor.

name: Crimp Terminal Blue — Ring (Olhal)
description: Blue insulated ring (olhal) crimp terminal. For 16–14 AWG wire. Bolt-mount ring end for secure electrical connections in panels and automotive wiring. Pack of 10.

name: Crimp Terminal Blue — Faston Female
description: Blue insulated female Faston (quick-disconnect) crimp terminal for 16–14 AWG wire. Connects to 6.35mm male Faston tabs. For reliable quick-connect wiring in electronics and automotive applications.

name: Crimp Terminal Blue — Faston Male
description: Blue insulated male Faston (quick-disconnect) crimp terminal for 16–14 AWG wire. Mates with female Faston terminals. Pack of 10.

name: Crimp Terminal Yellow — Ring (Olhal)
description: Yellow insulated ring crimp terminal for 12–10 AWG heavier wire. Bolt-mount for high-current connections. Pack of 10.

name: Crimp Terminal Yellow — Faston Female
description: Yellow insulated female Faston terminal for 12–10 AWG wire. High-current quick-disconnect connection. Pack of 10.

name: Crimp Terminal Yellow — Faston Male
description: Yellow insulated male Faston terminal for 12–10 AWG wire. High-current quick-disconnect connection. Pack of 10.
